title: notholaena cordata
intro: Notholaena cordata, also known as cord fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Notholaena cordata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal effects.
